title: Wellhead Pumpers
description: Operate power pumps and auxiliary equipment to produce flow of oil or gas from wells in oil field.

tasks.text: Monitor pumps and flow lines for gas and fluid leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start compressor engines and divert oil from storage tanks into compressor units and auxiliary equipment to recover natural gas from oil.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor control panels during pumping operations to ensure that materials are being pumped at the correct pressure, density, rate, and concentration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate engines and pumps to shut off wells according to production schedules, and to switch flow of oil into storage tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair gas and oil meters and gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance on vehicles and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Open valves to return compressed gas to bottoms of specified wells to repressurize them and force oil to surface.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare trucks and equipment necessary for the type of pumping service required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach pumps and hoses to wellheads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix acids, chemicals, or dry cement as required for a specific job.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload and assemble pipes and pumping equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise oil pumpers and other workers engaged in producing oil from wells.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
